plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Tatzo to use your location to show nearby tattoo artists.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Tatzo to use your location to show nearby tattoo artists.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Tatzo to use your camera to upload profile, portfolio, and tattoo reference images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Tatzo to access photos and videos for posts, reels, portfolio, and tattoo references.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Tatzo to save selected media if needed.
